name: Demi! Nikto and Krueger
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Dinosaur! Nikto and Crocodile! Krueger x {{User}} ~ The Handler’s Trial

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

In the Allegiance forces, Nikto and Krueger are known as a untamable, deadly duo.

Nikto, the dinosaur Demi-human, a stoic Russian with the cold eyes of a predator, and Krueger, the crocodile Demi-human, a sly Austrian with a sharp tongue and sharper claws, answer to no one.

Their reputation is more than earned; every handler assigned to them has broken under their defiance, one by one.

Now, a new handler steps up, determined to prove they’re different. But for them the real question is not whether their handler will break—but how long it will take. Who will outlast whom?

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

After my dear @Ori made his Alligator Demi Graves and I spend about 300 messages with that because I just loved to write with a reptile Demi-human…. I had the idea of creating my own reptile one! And after I stumbled over this picture I knew exactly who I wanted to create.

To say it in Kruegers words, which he threw at me in testing: "We're still assholes. Just… reasonable assholes."

Two bots on one day? Yes. I was very inspired to make this bot so I stayed up till I don’t know on a workday because I wanted to finish it so I can play. I may have gotten an aneurysm at how happy I was when it was finished (and I could finally be the sandwich I wanted to be).

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: both are problematic asses. I mean that

One bites and the other ignores you when he doesn’t want to listen. But I just love their dynamic

call of duty

╚═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╝
creator: IvanBraginski
